zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de Botetourt於大約1235年出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Lord Guy de Botetourte23歲，母親Elinor Bellinger20歲。他與ADA De Botetourt在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1316年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可可藍沃斯享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy de Botetourt于大约1235年出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲Lord Guy de Botetourte23岁，母亲Elinor Bellinger20岁。他与ADA De Botetourt在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1316年在英国英格兰諾福爾可可藍沃斯享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de Botetourt was born about 1235, in Norfolk, England, his father, Lord Guy de Botetourte, was 23 and his mother, Elinor Bellinger, was 20. He married ADA De Botetourt in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died about 1316, in Cranworth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de Botetourt est né environ 1235, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Lord Guy de Botetourte, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elinor Bellinger, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé ADA De Botetourt à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé environ 1316, à Cranworth, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de Botetourt um 1235 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Guy de Botetourte 23 und seine Mutter Elinor Bellinger 20. Er hat in England, United Kingdom ADA De Botetourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb um 1316 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Cranworth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Botetourt è nato il circa 1235 nel Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Lord Guy de Botetourte, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elinor Bellinger, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato ADA De Botetourt nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì circa 1316, nel Cranworth, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Botetourtが約1235年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Lord Guy de Botetourteは23歳，母Elinor Bellingerは20歳であった。イギリスイギリスでADA De Botetourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は約1316年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルククランウオルスで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Botetourt(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Guy de Botetourte(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elinor Bellinger(은)는 20세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드에서 ADA De Botetourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1316년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 크랜워스에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Botetourt nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Guy de Botetourte, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elinor Bellinger, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com ADA De Botetourt em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1316, em Cranworth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de Botetourt родился около 1235 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Guy de Botetourte было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elinor Bellinger, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени ADA De Botetourt в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер около 1316 г. в местности кранворт, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет.

Se casó con ADA De Botetourt en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1316, en Cranworth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años.
